_comment: HOK-2199 / HOK-2207 — SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for design-locked launch economics. Owner-confirmed: tokensPerDeltaOne 250k (NOT 500k — 2026-06-09), maxReward 2.5M, per-model starting mint budget 1.5M, vesting 10% immediate / 90% linear over 1 year, no cliff (2026-06-14). Every *-launch-tokens.json and *-launch-posture.json must agree with these values or test/scripts/launchEconomicsConsistency.test.js fails CI. Values are in WHOLE tokens; the guard multiplies by 1e18 to compare against the wei-denominated launch-posture expectations.
_mainnetAllocationsComment: M-6 (security review) — per-model mainnet launch allocations, owner-confirmed 2026-06-30 (@timogilvie). supplierAllocation = model-supplier tokens; investorAllocation = tokens available for investor purchase via the AMM; on-chain maxSupply (launch cap) = supplier + investor. The drift guard asserts mainnet-launch-tokens.json matches this exactly so allocation drift can no longer pass CI silently. Keep in sync with docs/mainnet-launch-token-parameter-lock.md (re-sign on any change).
